heading: Regulations
label: 16204 Regulations
text: This chapter shall be administered under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of Defense.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to amendment by .section 2130(c) of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1663(c)(4)(A)
